name: Pandamon

signature_move.name: Animal Nail
signature_move.description: Slices the foe with claws hidden in its paws.

description: A Puppet Digimon with the appearance of a panda. With its lack of expression and emotion, and blunt personality, it has no charm at all. Although it considers itself a lone wolf, it is thought that it is secretly jealous of the popular Monzaemon due to its similar appearance. However, since it is surprisingly powerful, meddlesome opponents will have the tables turned against them. Its population is small, so it is rarely seen. Its Special Move is attacking with the claws hidden within its paws ( Animal Nail ). Pandamon was adopted from a winning Digimon entry in the " Digimon Web Dot-art Contest " which belonged to Mr. Taiichirou Azuma from Miyagi prefecture .
